name: Frank Mantooth
abstract: Frank Mantooth (April 11, 1947 in Tulsa, Oklahoma – January 30, 2004 in Garden City, Kansas) was an American jazz pianist and arranger. Mantooth attended University of North Texas College of Music, graduating in 1969, then played in and arranged for the Air Force Academy Falconaires from 1969 to 1973.

about_quotes.speaker: Kristen Korb
about_quotes.evidence: I was the bass player but then on one of the sets the next night I sang with the big band and then I picked up my bass and played in a combo setting.
